title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER D — Papa+Sara+Eva Can't Catch Us! beach playground tag with slide gag
reuseAssetNote: ONE 10s render, paired with Suno song 'Cant Catch Us.mp3' via loopVideoWithSong.mjs to fill the 60s music block. Loop-clean tag-game choreography with curly tube-slide stuck-Papa visual gag.
prompt: Wide cinematic kid-show music-video shot at @beach-playground — wooden beach playground with a red curly tube-slide on the LEFT, a blue climbing tower with rope ladder in the CENTER-BACK, sandy ground with a few palm trees, soft ocean visible faintly in the soft pastel background. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame — no extra adults, no extra children, no background figures, no ghost extras. Bright cheerful warm summer daylight. The shot is designed as a LOOP-CLEAN tag-game music video. @Papa already on the LEFT side of the frame standing in the soft sand at the bottom opening of the red curly tube-slide with both feet planted on the sand, his upper body comically too big to fit through the slide tunnel — both hands lightly resting on his hips with a warm playful comic 'oh no I'm too big' dad-grin. Papa has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Sara already CENTER-RIGHT standing on the wooden playground deck halfway up the climbing tower with both feet planted on the deck, hands gently on her hips, ponytail with bow, beaming with cheerful playful tag-game smile. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands visible. @Eva already FAR-RIGHT standing on the wooden playground deck right next to Sara with both feet planted on the deck, also doing a hands-on-hips tag-game pose. Curly blonde hair with rainbow bow. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands visible. Mouths gently open in cheerful sing-along expression. Both girls perform a synchronized loop-clean playful tag-game dance: gentle hip-sway to the LEFT, gentle hip-sway to the RIGHT, both wave their right hand softly above their head with a 'you're it' wiggle, both wave their left hand softly above their head with another 'you're it' wiggle, both step gently in place — left foot, right foot — then return to standing facing the camera. Papa simultaneously performs his own loop-clean comic stuck-at-the-slide-bottom shimmy — gentle shoulder-wiggle LEFT, gentle shoulder-wiggle RIGHT, gentle dad-laugh head-shake LEFT, gentle dad-laugh head-shake RIGHT, then return to standing with hands on his hips. Movements are RHYTHMIC, PLAYFUL, and LOOPABLE. Camera locked, head-on, mid-angle. Bright cheerful warm summer afternoon lighting. The three of them hum and sing along generically — generic happy mouth movements, no specific lip-sync to specific words. Designed to LOOP cleanly: each character returns to identical starting pose at second 0 and second 10. No audible speech, no music — silent render. STRICT ANATOMY: Papa has exactly two arms and two hands at all times, both lightly on his hips. Sara has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. Eva has exactly two arms and two hands at all times. NO third hand, NO fourth arm, NO floating hand from any character. Each character stays grounded with both feet on the soft sand or wooden deck throughout — no leaping off the playground, no jumping off the tower, no climbing UP the slide, no flying.
